title: Adorable Cheese Block
description: A simple mod which adds a Cheese Block made specifically for Adorable Hamster Pets
body:
## Cheese Block

- This mod just adds a Cheese Block which can be crafted using Cheese from [Adorable Hamster Pets](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorable-hamster-pets)
- Unlike the Cheese item, this block **CANNOT** be eaten. It is purely a building block (which has a somewhat seamless texture)
